channel.title: Secur0 — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Secur0 (secur0).

item.title: CVE-2026-13164 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated self-registration in MailerUp allows access to stored email data
item.description: Missing Authentication for Critical Function (CWE-306) in the RegisterView (apps/accounts/views.py), exposed at POST /api/auth/register/, in MailerUp <1.0.1 allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to self-register a working account on instances whe…

item.title: CVE-2026-13163 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Lack of input validation in Mailerup input parameter leads to Open Redirect
item.description: Open redirect vulnerability (CWE-601) in the _safe_redirect function of the click-tracking endpoint (/c/<token>/) in Mailerup <1.0.0 on all platforms allows remote unauthenticated attackers to redirect victims to arbitrary external sites and conduct…

item.title: CVE-2026-13150 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SSRF in Pentestify PDF generation endpoint via Host header
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) (CWE-918) in the PDF generation endpoint GET /api/reports/{id}/pdf (backend/main.py) in ccyl13 Pentestify 1.0.0 and lower allows remote attackers to make the server issue requests to arbitrary internal or external U…
